FSM_EVENTS

Table to store FSM event definitions per class type.

Columns
fev_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key.

fev_fcl_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Primary key, reference to FSM_CLASSES.

fev_msg_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Name of a message to be used for logging, reference to PIT_MESSAGE.

fev_pti_id (according to `pit_util.ora_name_type`)

Translatable item, reference to PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM.

fev_raised_by_user (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag to indicate whether command is raisable by user, in contrast to job-only events.

fev_button_highlight (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag to indicate whether the command button shall be highlighted.

fev_confirm_message (`varchar2(200 char)`)

Optional message shown before the action takes place.

fev_button_icon (`varchar2(50 char)`)

Optional CSS class or URL to an icon.

fev_active (according to `pit_util.flag_type`)

Flag to indicate whether the event is currently in use.

Dependencies
fev_fcl_id

references FSM_CLASSES (fcl_id)

fev_msg_id

references <PIT_MESSAGE> (pms_id)

fev_pti_id, fev_fcl_id

references <PIT_TRANSLATABLE_ITEM> (pti_uid, pti_upmg)
